nasb.text: The fish that were in the Nile died, and the Nile became foul, so that the Egyptians could not drink water from the Nile. And the blood was through all the land of Egypt.

esv.text: And the fish in the Nile died, and the Nile stank, so that the Egyptians could not drink water from the Nile. There was blood throughout all the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 河裡的魚死了，河水發臭了，埃及人也不能喝這河裡的水了；在埃及，全地都有血。

ccb.text: 河里的鱼都死了，河水臭得不能饮用。埃及遍地都是血。
